message:
perf(mvcc): drop stable-sort of conflicting_pages in FCW validation

validate_first_committer_wins was doing
    conflicting_pages.sort_unstable();
right before emitting the tracing::warn. The comment claimed "Sort for
deterministic output" but the output is a `conflicting_page_count`
integer plus `max_conflicting_seq`, neither of which depends on ordering.
The only reason to sort was if downstream log-parsing relied on a
deterministic page-number list — we don't log the list, only the count.

On write-heavy workloads with many conflicting pages the sort showed up
as a small but measurable slice of FCW validation time. Dropped the
sort; log output is unchanged.
